PreToolUse.command: echo "[Semantic Officer][PreToolUse] Scope-first: combined_space.py, control_room/*.py, and matching tests unless user expands scope."
PreToolUse.windows: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Write-Output '[Semantic Officer][PreToolUse] Scope-first: combined_space.py, control_room/*.py, and matching tests unless user expands scope.'"

PostToolUse.command: echo "[Semantic Officer][PostToolUse] Report in order: Scope, Contract, Changes, Validation, Risk."
PostToolUse.windows: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Write-Output '[Semantic Officer][PostToolUse] Report in order: Scope, Contract, Changes, Validation, Risk.'"
